name: Fish in Cilantro Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pickled Jalapeno Pepper, Rinsed, Seeded and Chopped (about 1 1/2 tsp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Use large Red Snapper or other fish fillets cut into 6 serving pieces.
2. Rinse the pickled jalapeno pepper, remove seeds, and chop it finely. Measure about 1 1/2 teaspoons of chopped peppers.
3. Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add onions and sauté until softened.
4. Stir in garlic and cook for another minute.
5. Add fish fillets to the pan and fry until golden brown on both sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
6. Mix together lime juice, almonds, salt, pepper, and cilantro.
7. Spoon sauce over the fish and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
8. Turn off heat and serve hot.
